While Gerrard gave us those iconic moments, Frank Lampard's sheer statistical output from midfield is UNMATCHED. 177 Premier League goals – NO other midfielder comes close. Was his consistent attacking threat underrated in their legendary rivalry? 🤔 #PLHistory #MidfieldMaestro

🤯 STOP THE PRESS! Forget today's strikers, who was the real goal king?

Gerd Müller's 365 Bundesliga goals in 427 games is utterly ridiculous. But Ferenc Puskás? 514 goals in 529 games before Real Madrid, then 156 in 180 for them! Different beasts, same hunger. Who's your pick?

#FootballLegends #GoalMachine #ClassicFootball #Muller #Puskas #History

Who's the most criminally underrated striker of the modern era? 🤔 Samuel Eto'o's TWO trebles with two different clubs should silence debates. Scored in two Champions League finals, adapted from clinical striker to relentless winger for Pep, then led the line for Mou's Inter. The ultimate big-game player, yet somehow forgotten in GOAT conversations. Madness! #UCL #FootballHistory

Who really terrified PL defenders more? Thierry Henry vs Ruud van Nistelrooy. Henry, the complete artist: blistering pace, assists, goals from anywhere. RVN, the ultimate predator: pure penalty box assassin, one touch, GONE. One offered magic, the other merciless efficiency. Which prime striker gave YOU nightmares? #PL #FootballLegends

Think African legends started recently? WRONG. George Weah in '95 didn't just win the Ballon d'Or – he was a hurricane for AC Milan. Power, pace, solo goals that defied logic. The first, and still only, African to claim football's top individual prize. An absolute GOAT of his era.

Forget the fancy dribbles, back when strikers were pure finishers, nobody debated it harder than Thierry Henry vs Ruud van Nistelrooy! Henry with the elegance, the solo goals that made you gasp. Henry's 4 Golden Boots speak volumes, but Ruud's goals-per-game in the Champions League was insane! #PLlegends #StrikerDebate

Chelsea's main man wasn't just a striker; he was a big game phenomenon. 10 goals in 10 cup finals for the Blues. Absolute clutch king. Forget his league numbers, when the pressure mounted, Drogba ALWAYS delivered. Unmatched mentality. #UCL #ChelseaFC #FootballHistory
